heading: What do you want to do?
subheading: Pick a starting point — you can switch any time.

write.title: Write
write.desc: Start a new book or continue writing — draft chapters with an AI co-writer.

world.title: Build a world
world.desc: Author lore — characters, places, factions — with no manuscript required.

translate.title: Translate
translate.desc: Bring an existing book into another language with the translation pipeline.

explore.title: Explore
explore.desc: Browse your knowledge — entities, timelines and the relationship graph.

assistant.title: Work assistant
assistant.desc: A private daily journal that quietly remembers your people, projects and decisions.
